title: Getting Started
seoTitle: Game of Darts Getting Started | BarkinMad Studios
description: Set up players, choose a darts mode, start play, enter scores, and find statistics and leaderboards after a Game of Darts session.
summary: Start by adding players, selecting a mode, confirming options, playing the match, then reviewing stats, results, and Game Center surfaces.

sections.heading: Basic flow
paragraphs: Add at least two players for normal local games, or add one player when using DartBot in Match play after DartBot access is unlocked.
Choose a game mode, review the available options, start the game, enter scores or hits as the app prompts, then view stats, results, and leaderboards after play.
bullets: Quick Start 501 is available from the main menu for fast X01 setup.
Game Center sign-in enables leaderboards and achievements.
Players and supported session data sync automatically when you are connected.

sections.heading: Online and offline
paragraphs: When you are online, sessions, leaderboards, and stats can sync across supported devices.
When offline, most of the game stays available while optional features may be limited.

images.caption: Existing Game of Darts artwork used as the getting-started visual
